landing.title: TippCasino
landing.subtitle: Predict sports matches, earn points, compete with friends!
landing.featureBetDesc: Predict the exact score of matches and choose your stake.
landing.featureCompeteDesc: Create groups and invite your friends to compete.
landing.featureWinDesc: Earn points for accurate predictions and climb the leaderboard.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.howToPlayTokensDesc: You get tokens every match day. Join a group late? You'll still receive tokens for the days you missed — no catching up needed.
tournaments.howToPlayBettingDesc: Predict the exact final score (e.g. 3:1) and choose your stake. You can even bet on upcoming matches in advance. Update any time before the match starts.
tournaments.howToPlayScoringDesc: Get the outcome right and you win back stake × odds. Bonus if the goal difference matches too — even more for the exact score. Wrong prediction: nothing.
tournaments.howToPlayPodiumDesc: Before the tournament starts, predict the top 3 teams in order. You earn bonus tokens for each correct position.
tournaments.noGroupYet: You're not a member of any group yet. Join and compete!
tournaments.noGroupYetShort: You're not a member of any group yet.
tournaments.noPublicGroup: No active groups for this tournament yet.
tournaments.joinAnotherGroup: Join another group, or create your own:
tournaments.createOwnGroupHint: Want to play with friends too? Create your own group!

matches.oddsNotAvailable: Odds not yet available. Your bet will use the first available odds.

betting.title: Place Bet
betting.sameForAll: Same bet for all my groups

groups.title: My Groups
groups.name: Group name
groups.settingsLocked: Settings can only be changed while the tournament is upcoming.
groups.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave this group?
groups.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group? This will permanently remove all bets, tokens, and memberships.
groups.defaultsApplied: Defaults applied. Edit after creation in group settings.
groups.noBetsForPlayer: No bets on finished matches yet
groups.publicGroupsSubtitle: Join any group with a single click
groups.publicDescription: Anyone can join without an invite
groups.noUpcomingMatches: No matches in the next 3 days
groups.allBetsDone: All bets placed for the next 3 days
groups.officialGroupNameReserved: This name is reserved for the leaderboard
groups.cannotDeleteOfficial: The leaderboard group cannot be deleted

admin.title: Admin
admin.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive "{name}"? It will only be hidden from listings; group members can still access it.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.text: TippCasino (tippcasino.vercel.app) is a sports prediction game application. We care about your data privacy. This policy describes what data we collect and how we use it.

dataCollected.title: What data do we collect?
dataCollected.text: When you sign in with Google, we access the following information:
dataCollected.name: Your name and profile picture

usage.title: How do we use your data?
usage.text: We use your data solely for in-app identification, displaying you on leaderboards, and managing group memberships. We do not send marketing emails or sell your data to third parties.

thirdParty.title: Third-party services
thirdParty.text: The application uses Google OAuth for authentication, Neon for database storage, and Vercel for hosting. These providers handle data according to their own privacy policies.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.text: We retain your data as long as you have an active account. If you would like your data deleted, please contact us.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.text: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your stored data. You can revoke the application's access at any time in your Google account settings.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For privacy-related questions, contact the application operator at krasser.tamas@gmail.com.

service.title: Service description
service.text: TippCasino (tippcasino.vercel.app) is a free entertainment-only prediction game where users predict sports match results using virtual tokens. The application does not involve real-money gambling.

accounts.title: Accounts and access
accounts.text: A Google account is required to use the service. Users are responsible for all activity under their account. The operator reserves the right to suspend or delete any account without notice.

usage.title: Acceptable use
usage.text: The service is for entertainment purposes only. Manipulating the system, automated betting, harassing other users, or any illegal activity is prohibited.

tokens.title: Virtual tokens
tokens.text: Tokens used in the application are purely virtual and hold no real-world value. Tokens cannot be exchanged for money or transferred between users.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.text: The service is provided as-is, without warranty. The operator is not liable for service outages, data loss, or any damages incurred by users.

changes.title: Changes to terms
changes.text: The operator reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For questions, contact the application operator at krasser.tamas@gmail.com.

profile.displayNameDescription: This is how others will see you. Leave empty to use your Google name.
